name: S1.3 概率（条件/独立/全概率）
subject: math
curriculum_points:
• use the derivatives of ex, ln x, sin x, cos x,
tan x, together with constant multiples, sums,
differences and composites

• find and use the first derivative of a function
which is defined parametrically or implicitly.

excerpts.text:
• use the derivatives of ex, ln x, sin x, cos x,
tan x, together with constant multiples, sums,
differences and composites

• find and use the first derivative of a function
which is defined parametrically or implicitly.

interactive_resources.description: Desmos 二项分布概率交互
GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「S1.3 概率（条件/独立/全概率）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：• use the derivatives of ex, ln x, sin x, cos x,
tan x, together with constant multiples, sums,
differences and composit…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：• differentiate products and quotients… 对理解「S1.3 概率（条件/独立/全概率）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
